title: Simplified Dark Theme GUI
description: Dark Theme For Gui But More Simplified
body:
# Simplified Dark Theme Texture Pack
## No More Sharp Edges | No More Unnecessary Much Color Gradient/Shading | No More Fancy Looking Gui | Created For More Simplified Design!
## **IMPORTANT : ALL "BETA" PACK MEANS THEY ALL WORKING BUT DIDNT DO ANY DEEP TEST FOR BUGS,SO THEY ARE STILL WORKING!!**
